languages.text: "...участники битвы за мир Кур'Бис, расположенный в соседней звездной системе. Мелкие распри для мировой сцены, значимый эпизод для этого региона. Помнится, они столь увлеклись, что не заметили, как я забрал себе и тот мир, и их самих".

traits.locale_text: "Участники битвы за мир Кур'Бис, расположенный в соседней здездной системе. Мелкие распри для мировой сцены, значимый эпизод для этого региона. Помнится, они столь увлеклись, что не заметили, как я забрал себе и тот мир, и их самих".

languages.text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."
languages.original_text: "...участники битвы за мир Кур'Бис, расположенный в соседней звездной системе. Мелкие распри для мировой сцены, значимый эпизод для этого региона. Помнится, они столь увлеклись, что не заметили, как я забрал себе и тот мир, и их самих".

traits.locale_text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

"Participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a global stage, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

"Participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a global stage, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

"...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

languages.text: “……邻近星系的库尔比斯世界之战的参与者。放在整个银河系看只是些小打小闹，但在这个区域却是举足轻重的大事。我记得，他们打得太投入，丝毫没察觉到我把整颗星球，连同他们一块儿带走了。”
languages.original_text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

traits.locale_text: “……邻近星系的库尔比斯世界之战的参与者。放在整个银河系看只是些小打小闹，但在这个区域却是举足轻重的大事。我记得，他们打得太投入，丝毫没察觉到我把整颗星球，连同他们一块儿带走了。”

languages.text: «... participantes en la batalla del planeta Kur'Bys, situado en un sistema vecino. Pequeñas disputas a escala galáctica, lo que representó un episodio importante para la región. Por lo que recuerdo, estaban tan centrados en sus disputas que ni siquiera notaron que me había llevado su mundo y a ellos con él».
languages.original_text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

traits.locale_text: «... participantes en la batalla del planeta Kur'Bys, situado en un sistema vecino. Pequeñas disputas a escala galáctica, lo que representó un episodio importante para la región. Por lo que recuerdo, estaban tan centrados en sus disputas que ni siquiera notaron que me había llevado su mundo y a ellos con él».

languages.text: « ... participé à la bataille de Kur'Bys, situé dans un système stellaire voisin. Ces querelles sont insignifiantes à l'échelle galactique, mais il s'agit d'un épisode marquant de l'histoire de la région. Dans mon souvenir, la bataille les a tant absorbés qu'ils n'ont pas remarqué que je m'étais emparé de leur monde, et de leur civilisation. »
languages.original_text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

traits.locale_text: « ... participé à la bataille de Kur'Bys, situé dans un système stellaire voisin. Ces querelles sont insignifiantes à l'échelle galactique, mais il s'agit d'un épisode marquant de l'histoire de la région. Dans mon souvenir, la bataille les a tant absorbés qu'ils n'ont pas remarqué que je m'étais emparé de leur monde, et de leur civilisation. »

languages.text: "Bitişik bir yıldız sisteminde bulunan Kur'Bys dünyasında yapılan savaşın katılımcıları. Koca galaksi düşünüldüğü epey küçük bir çekişme, bu bölge içinse önemli bir hadise. Hatırladığım kadarıyla o kadar kendilerini kaptırmışlardı ki hem dünyayı hem de yanında kendilerini aldığımı fark edemediler."
languages.original_text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

traits.locale_text: "Bitişik bir yıldız sisteminde bulunan Kur'Bys dünyasında yapılan savaşın katılımcıları. Koca galaksi düşünüldüğü epey küçük bir çekişme, bu bölge içinse önemli bir hadise. Hatırladığım kadarıyla o kadar kendilerini kaptırmışlardı ki hem dünyayı hem de yanında kendilerini aldığımı fark edemediler."

languages.text: "... Teilnehmer der Schlacht um Kur'Bys, die sich in einem benachbarten Sternensystem ereignete. Unbedeutende Querelen aus galaktischer Sicht, aber eine bedeutsame Episode für diese Region. Soweit ich mich erinnere, waren sie derart beschäftigt, dass sie nicht einmal bemerkten, dass ich mir ihre Welt geholt hatte."
languages.original_text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

traits.locale_text: "... Teilnehmer der Schlacht um Kur'Bys, die sich in einem benachbarten Sternensystem ereignete. Unbedeutende Querelen aus galaktischer Sicht, aber eine bedeutsame Episode für diese Region. Soweit ich mich erinnere, waren sie derart beschäftigt, dass sie nicht einmal bemerkten, dass ich mir ihre Welt geholt hatte."

languages.text: 「…隣星系にあるクルビスの世界を巡る戦いの参加者たち。銀河規模の些細な争い、この地域にとって重要な出来事。記憶に覚えているのですが、彼らはあまりにも熱中して、私がその世界を占領したことに気づかなかったのです。」
languages.original_text: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."

traits.locale_text: 「…隣星系にあるクルビスの世界を巡る戦いの参加者たち。銀河規模の些細な争い、この地域にとって重要な出来事。記憶に覚えているのですが、彼らはあまりにも熱中して、私がその世界を占領したことに気づかなかったのです。」
